image_prompt_master: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface.
image_prompt_scene: scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge.
image_prompt_characters: character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand.
image_prompt_shot: shot S003. camera intent: comic_panel_08. action beats: 林澈的手机屏幕亮起; 特写屏幕显示一行字：别喝; 林澈惊恐地看向手机. narration intent: 旁白 explains "手机忽然亮起，屏幕上只有一行字：别喝。". dialogue mood: 林澈 says "这是谁发的？". Shot-to-shot continuity: maintain exact character identity, scene layout, lighting and prop positions from previous shot. Visual style must match preceding frame. shot positive notes: Extreme close-up of smartphone screen in dim kitchen, text '别喝' displayed, reflection of young man's face in screen, blue light on face, tense expression, shallow depth of field, high contrast.
image_prompt_final: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge. character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand. shot S003. camera intent: comic_panel_08. action beats: 林澈的手机屏幕亮起; 特写屏幕显示一行字：别喝; 林澈惊恐地看向手机. narration intent: 旁白 explains "手机忽然亮起，屏幕上只有一行字：别喝。". dialogue mood: 林澈 says "这是谁发的？". Shot-to-shot continuity: maintain exact character identity, scene layout, lighting and prop positions from previous shot. Visual style must match preceding frame. shot positive notes: Extreme close-up of smartphone screen in dim kitchen, text '别喝' displayed, reflection of young man's face in screen, blue light on face, tense expression, shallow depth of field, high contrast.
negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, bright, daytime, anime, oversaturated, face drift, outfit change, prop drift, wrong set layout, extra fingers, text artifacts, subtitles burned into image, logo, watermark

reference_images.note: wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right
table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp
rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge

voiceover.speaker: 旁白
voiceover.text: 手机忽然亮起，屏幕上只有一行字：别喝。

manual_workflow.external_generation: paste image_prompt_final and negative_prompt into any web image/video tool; upload reference_images when supported
manual_workflow.context_hint: Use context_keyframes as visual reference to maintain shot-to-shot continuity with previous shot.
